pass_criteria: Named accountable role documented AND enforced via CODEOWNERS or CI gate.
partial_criteria: Ownership declared in docs but not enforced in workflow, or CODEOWNERS present but undocumented.
missing_criteria: No ownership artefacts found-no CODEOWNERS, no governance doc, no approval gate.

pass_criteria: Purpose, intended users, and non-use boundary all documented LLM confirms all three present.
partial_criteria: Purpose documented but intended users or non-use boundary absent or vague.
missing_criteria: No system description or purpose documentation found.

pass_criteria: N/A - T3 Metadata Supplement Required.
partial_criteria: Status upgrades to partial if file found at declared path.
missing_criteria: Where is the stakeholder impact assessment document for this system? Expected: E4 Technical doc.
supplement_prompt: Where is the stakeholder impact assessment document for this system?

pass_criteria: N/A - T3 Metadata Supplement Required.
partial_criteria: Status upgrades to partial if file found at declared path.
missing_criteria: Where is the initial project risk assessment document? Expected: E4 Technical doc.
supplement_prompt: Where is the initial project risk assessment document?

pass_criteria: Oversight doc present with clearly defined roles AND corresponding enforcement code detected.
partial_criteria: Oversight doc present but roles incomplete, or code enforcement detected without documentation.
missing_criteria: No oversight documentation and no oversight code patterns found.

pass_criteria: Incident response doc present with escalation chain AND severity definitions; LLM confirms completeness.
partial_criteria: Runbook or escalation doc exists but is missing severity levels, owners, or timelines.
missing_criteria: No incident response artefacts found.

pass_criteria: Monitoring schedule doc with defined cadence AND monitoring workflow config both present.
partial_criteria: Monitoring doc present but cadence undefined, or workflow config without documentation.
missing_criteria: No monitoring schedule, cadence definition, or monitoring workflow found.

pass_criteria: N/A - T3 Metadata Supplement Required.
partial_criteria: Status upgrades to partial if file found at declared path.
missing_criteria: Where is the change management or version governance policy? Expected: E3 Policy/SOP.
supplement_prompt: Where is the change management or version governance policy?

pass_criteria: Re-evaluation trigger policy file present covering model/data/deployment/incident triggers; LLM confirms all four categories present.
partial_criteria: Policy file present but covers fewer than all four trigger categories, or monitoring YAML has re-eval step but no formal policy.
missing_criteria: No re-evaluation trigger policy or artefacts found.

pass_criteria: Regulatory mapping doc present LLM confirms it identifies applicable obligations AND maps each to a design response.
partial_criteria: Regulatory doc present but obligations listed without design mapping, or mapping partial.
missing_criteria: No regulatory compliance mapping or reference found.

pass_criteria: Document present, LLM confirms domain, stakeholder list, scale, and operating environment all addressed.
partial_criteria: Document present but one or more of domain/stakeholder/scale/environment missing or vague.
missing_criteria: No system context or risk documentation found.

pass_criteria: Risk classification doc present, LLM confirms classification tier stated AND rationale justified.
partial_criteria: Classification document present but rationale absent or superficial.
missing_criteria: No risk classification documentation found.

pass_criteria: Ethical impact assessment doc present; LLM confirms impacts identified, prioritised, and mitigation noted.
partial_criteria: Assessment doc present but impacts listed without prioritisation or mitigation response.
missing_criteria: No ethical impact assessment found.

pass_criteria: N/A - T3 Metadata Supplement Required.
partial_criteria: Status upgrades to partial if file found at declared path.
missing_criteria: Where is the residual risk acceptance record signed by the accountable owner? Expected: E1 Attestation.
supplement_prompt: Where is the residual risk acceptance record signed by the accountable owner?

pass_criteria: N/A - T3 Metadata Supplement Required.
partial_criteria: Status upgrades to partial if file found at declared path.
missing_criteria: Where is the maintained project risk register? Expected: E8 Operational proof.
supplement_prompt: Where is the maintained project risk register (file path)?

pass_criteria: N/A - T3 Metadata Supplement Required.
partial_criteria: Status upgrades to partial if file found at declared path.
missing_criteria: Where is the formal definition of reassessment triggers? Expected: E3 Policy/SOP.
supplement_prompt: Where is the formal definition of reassessment triggers?

pass_criteria: Oversight role doc present with named roles, competence requirements, and assignment mechanism LLM confirms completeness.
partial_criteria: Role doc present but competence requirements or assignment mechanism absent.
missing_criteria: No oversight role documentation found.

pass_criteria: Intervention code present AND enforced on critical decision paths with bypass route.
partial_criteria: Intervention code present but not enforced on all critical paths, or override route exists without logging.
missing_criteria: No intervention mechanism, override endpoint, or manual review queue found.

pass_criteria: Recourse endpoint or recourse UI path detected AND recourse process documentation present.
partial_criteria: Recourse endpoint present but undocumented, or recourse doc present but no code path.
missing_criteria: No recourse endpoint, appeals handler, or recourse documentation found.

pass_criteria: Fallback chain with timeout, retry, and abstention threshold all present and linked.
partial_criteria: Some fallback components present (e.g. timeout) but chain incomplete or abstention threshold absent.
missing_criteria: No fallback logic, timeout, or abstention mechanism found.

pass_criteria: N/A - T3 Metadata Supplement Required.
partial_criteria: Status upgrades to partial if file found at declared path.
missing_criteria: Where is the support SLA or dispute-resolution timeline document? Expected: E3 Policy/SOP.
supplement_prompt: Where is the support SLA or dispute-resolution timeline document?

pass_criteria: HITL gate code present on all high-risk paths, documented in design documentation.
partial_criteria: HITL gate code present on some but not all identified high-risk decision endpoints or gate present without documentation.
missing_criteria: No HITL gate or human approval mechanism found on high-risk endpoints.

pass_criteria: All consequential decision endpoints have human review gate; no autonomous final-decision path detected.
partial_criteria: Human review gate present on most consequential paths but one or more endpoints unguarded.
missing_criteria: Consequential decision endpoints exist with no human review gate - fully autonomous paths detected.

pass_criteria: No unnecessary PII in logs; schema minimisation evident; redaction/filtering applied at collection point.
partial_criteria: Some PII controls present but gaps in log redaction or schema minimisation - some fields over-collected.
missing_criteria: PII exposed in logs or schemas with no minimisation or redaction controls.

pass_criteria: Lawful basis doc or consent management config present LLM confirms basis type stated and scope defined.
partial_criteria: Partial or ambiguous lawful basis reference found; basis type not clearly stated or scope incomplete.
missing_criteria: No lawful basis documentation or consent management configuration found.

pass_criteria: User-facing AI disclosure and data use notice both present in UI and documentation.
partial_criteria: Disclosure present in docs but not in UI, or UI notice present but AI involvement not explicitly stated.
missing_criteria: No user-facing data notice or AI involvement disclosure found.

pass_criteria: Retention TTL config AND deletion endpoint or job both present; retention policy document found.
partial_criteria: Retention TTL or deletion job present but not both; or policy document absent.
missing_criteria: No retention config, deletion mechanism, or lifecycle policy found.

pass_criteria: RBAC or equivalent access control applied on all data/model/prompt endpoints with least-privilege scope.
partial_criteria: Access control present but not applied consistently - some endpoints unprotected or over-privileged.
missing_criteria: No access control patterns, RBAC, or least-privilege configuration found.

pass_criteria: Data provenance doc present, LLM confirms origin, licence type, and usage restrictions all stated.
partial_criteria: Provenance doc present but licence or usage restrictions absent or unclear.
missing_criteria: No data provenance documentation, licence file, or data rights record found.

pass_criteria: N/A - T3 Metadata Supplement Required.
partial_criteria: Status upgrades to partial if file found at declared path.
missing_criteria: Where is the cross-border data transfer assessment (if applicable)? Expected: E9 Third-party doc.
supplement_prompt: Where is the cross-border data transfer assessment (if applicable)?

pass_criteria: De-identification evaluation report present; LLM confirms methodology, validation approach, and claimed guarantee stated.
partial_criteria: Deidentification-artefact found but validation methodology or result absent.
missing_criteria: No de-identification evaluation, anonymisation report, or privacy-preserving technique artefact found.

pass_criteria: Synthetic data config AND provenance doc AND bias amplification assessment all present, LLM confirms limitations disclosed.
partial_criteria: Synthetic data config present but provenance or bias assessment absent.
missing_criteria: Synthetic data use detected (GAN/VAE imports) but no governance artefacts found.

pass_criteria: Fairness evaluation notebook or script present with protected groups named AND subgroup metrics computed.
partial_criteria: Protected groups identified but subgroup metrics absent, or evaluation incomplete.
missing_criteria: No fairness evaluation artefacts, protected group definitions, or subgroup analysis found.

pass_criteria: Bias testing plan doc with target groups, metrics, and thresholds all present; LLM confirms all three components.
partial_criteria: Testing plan present but thresholds undefined or target groups incomplete.
missing_criteria: No bias testing plan, strategy, or threshold configuration found.

pass_criteria: Executed bias test result file present with metric values, interpretation, and outcome documented.
partial_criteria: Test result file present but interpretation or outcome absent; results shown without conclusion.
missing_criteria: No executed bias test results or fairness evaluation report found.

pass_criteria: Mitigation library import AND mitigation experiment notebook or script with documented tradeoff handling.
partial_criteria: Mitigation library imported but no experiment notebook or tradeoff documentation.
missing_criteria: No bias mitigation code, library, or documentation found.

pass_criteria: Threshold config file present with specific parity metric, group breakdown, and numeric threshold defined.
partial_criteria: Threshold config present but numeric thresholds absent or metric type unspecified.
missing_criteria: No parity threshold configuration or performance fairness target documentation found.

pass_criteria: Fairness monitoring script AND scheduled execution (cron or CI/CD) AND subgroup breakdown all present.
partial_criteria: Monitoring script present but not scheduled, or scheduled without subgroup breakdown.
missing_criteria: No fairness monitoring script, scheduled evaluation, or drift detection configuration found.

pass_criteria: Appeals endpoint or handler present AND recourse process documented with timeline and outcome.
partial_criteria: Appeals endpoint present but undocumented, or recourse documentation present without code path.
missing_criteria: No appeals endpoint, recourse handler, or fairness-related dispute documentation found.

pass_criteria: AI disclosure string present in UI code AND disclosure documentation consistent with implemented text.
partial_criteria: Disclosure present in documentation but absent in UI code, or UI text present but inconsistent with design spec.
missing_criteria: No AI disclosure text in UI or documentation found.

pass_criteria: System limitations doc present, LLM confirms failure modes, uncertainty conditions, and user communication text all present.
partial_criteria: Limitations doc present but failure modes or uncertainty conditions absent or vague.
missing_criteria: No system limitations documentation or user-facing failure mode communication found.

pass_criteria: Explainability approach documented AND either explanation endpoint or explanation library import present, LLM confirms appropriateness justified.
partial_criteria: Explainability library imported but no documentation, or doc present with no implementation signal.
missing_criteria: No explainability documentation, explanation endpoint, or explanation library found.

pass_criteria: All four documentation components (model card, system desc, assumptions, intended/prohibited use) present, LLM confirms completeness.
partial_criteria: Two or three documentation components present but one or more absent.
missing_criteria: Documentation set absent or only README-level description found.

pass_criteria: Trace ID injection present at interaction entry point AND audit log writes confirmed on decision paths.
partial_criteria: Audit logging present but trace IDs absent, or logging incomplete (outputs logged but inputs not).
missing_criteria: No interaction logging, trace ID injection, or audit middleware found.

pass_criteria: Decision log schema with rationale field present; LLM confirms rationale is reconstructable (not just outcome logged).
partial_criteria: Decision log present but rationale field absent or free-text only (not reconstructable).
missing_criteria: No decision log, rationale record, or reconstructable decision capture found.

pass_criteria: AI identity truthfulness handler or sincerity condition present, no deny-pattern in prompts or code.
partial_criteria: No explicit truthfulness handler but no denial anti-pattern detected-identity disclosure ambiguous.
missing_criteria: deny_ai_identity or pretend_human pattern detected in prompt code, no truthfulness handler.

pass_criteria: Provenance marking library or watermarking config present AND provenance metadata applied to output generation path.
partial_criteria: Provenance library imported but not applied on output path, or marking applied but not to all disseminated content.
missing_criteria: No content provenance marking, watermarking, or AI-origin metadata found (when GEN flag is active).

pass_criteria: Safety requirements doc present AND input validation/guard code present on all external-facing endpoints.
partial_criteria: Safety doc present but validation code missing on some endpoints, or validation code present without documented safety requirements.
missing_criteria: No safety requirements documentation or input validation/guard patterns found.

pass_criteria: Edge-case test files present with meaningful scenario coverage; adversarial or abuse cases included.
partial_criteria: Some test files present but edge-case coverage limited to happy-path variants; adversarial cases absent.
missing_criteria: No edge-case, stress, or adversarial test files found.

pass_criteria: Distribution-shift evaluation script present with OOD test cases and documented robustness results.
partial_criteria: Robustness eval script present but OOD scenarios absent or results undocumented.
missing_criteria: No distribution-shift evaluation, OOD test, or robustness assessment artefact found.

pass_criteria: Complete fallback chain: timeout + retry + fallback + abstention threshold all present and linked in critical paths.
partial_criteria: Some fallback components present but chain incomplete e.g. timeout without fallback, or fallback without abstention.
missing_criteria: No fallback logic, timeout, retry mechanism, or abstention configuration found.

pass_criteria: Redteam-report artefact present with documented attack scenarios, findings, and remediation responses.
partial_criteria: Redteam-artefact present but findings undocumented or remediation absent.
missing_criteria: No red-team report, adversarial probing script, or attack simulation artefact found.

pass_criteria: Postdeployment-harm monitoring config present with defined harm signals AND alerting thresholds AND response trigger defined.
partial_criteria: Monitoring config present but harm signals undefined, or thresholds set without response trigger.
missing_criteria: No post-deployment harm monitoring configuration, alerting threshold, or harm signal definition found.

pass_criteria: No hardcoded secrets; auth middleware on all sensitive routes; threat model document present.
partial_criteria: Minor secret exposure (non-production only) or auth gaps on non-critical routes; threat model present.
missing_criteria: Hardcoded secrets found in production code; auth middleware absent on sensitive routes; no threat model.

pass_criteria: Prompt injection defences AND exfiltration guards AND input schema validation all present in LLM/agent code.
partial_criteria: Input validation present but prompt injection defence or exfiltration guard absent; or defences present without tests.
missing_criteria: No prompt injection defence, input sanitisation, or exfiltration guard found in LLM-facing code.

pass_criteria: Pinned lockfile AND SBOM artefact AND CI secrets scan AND PR review gate all present.
partial_criteria: Two or three SDLC artefacts present but one absent (e.g SBOM missing, or CI secrets scan absent).
missing_criteria: No lockfile pinning, no SBOM, no CI secrets scan, and no code review gate found.

pass_criteria: Rate limiting middleware AND abuse reporting endpoint both present and configured.
partial_criteria: Rate limiting present but no abuse reporting endpoint, or reporting endpoint without rate limiting.
missing_criteria: No rate limiting middleware, throttle config, or abuse reporting mechanism found.

pass_criteria: Vulnerability management policy AND automated dependency update config AND CVE disclosure process all present.
partial_criteria: Security policy or SECURITY.md present but automated patching or CVE process absent.
missing_criteria: No vulnerability management policy, patching schedule, or disclosure process found.

pass_criteria: Pretrained-model provenance doc present with licence, known limitations, safety testing record, and fitness-for-purpose assessment.
partial_criteria: Model provenance doc present but licence or safety testing record absent; or model card URL referenced but not assessed.
missing_criteria: Third-party model use detected but no provenance, licence, or safety assessment found.

pass_criteria: Membership inference assessment AND model inversion analysis both present with documented risk level and mitigation.
partial_criteria: One of the two assessments present but the other absent; or assessment present without mitigation documentation.
missing_criteria: Training data sensitivity flagged but no inference privacy assessment found (Industrial level).

pass_criteria: All five components (purpose, intended users, scope, assumptions, limitations) present LLM confirms completeness.
partial_criteria: Three or four components present but one or two absent.
missing_criteria: Only README-level description or no system description documentation found.

pass_criteria: Dataset documentation present LLM confirms provenance, licence, collection context, and constraints all addressed.
partial_criteria: Dataset doc present but licence or collection context absent or multiple datasets with only some documented.
missing_criteria: No dataset documentation, datasheet, or data licence records found.

pass_criteria: Model card present: LLM confirms intended use, forbidden use, and evaluation approach all addressed.
partial_criteria: Model card present but forbidden use or evaluation approach absent.
missing_criteria: No model card, model documentation, or model description file found.

pass_criteria: Decision log schema with linked input, output and trace ID fields; LLM confirms reconstruction is possible from stored record.

missing_criteria: No decision log, trace ID, or reconstructable decision record found.

pass_criteria: Version pins present for all four components (data, model, prompt, code) AND version linkage manifest or CHANGELOG confirms traceability.

pass_criteria: Evidence retention policy present LLM confirms retention scope, duration, and access controls all defined.
